'''Majilop''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations" /> located within the [[Majilop system/Legends|star system]] of the same name, a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Lol sector/Legends|Lol sector]].<ref name="Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion" /> Around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="date">''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'' is set around six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars:'' Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which takes place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''.</ref> it served as the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Lucin Syndicate]], a major producer and distributor of illegal [[holoporn]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations" />

==Behind the scenes==
Majilop was mentioned in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'', written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Majilop [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Majilop, in grid square Q-18.<ref name="The Essential Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
